seoTitle: Kelso vs Kempton — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kelso and Kempton. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kelso and Kempton.
heading: Kelso vs Kempton — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kelso, Tasmania and Kempton, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kelso has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Kempton (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kelso or Kempton safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kelso has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Kempton scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kelso scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Kempton scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kelso or Kempton?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kelso has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
